level.description:
Level of the block, at which the event was emitted.  
**[sortable]**

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the block, at which the event was emitted.

contract.description:
Contract emitted the event.  
Click on the field to expand more details.

payload.description:
Event payload in human-readable JSON format.  
**[sortable]**

transactionId.description: Internal TzKT id of the transaction operation, caused the event.

type.description:
Michelson type of the payload.  
**Must be explicitly selected**

rawPayload.description:
Payload in raw Micheline format.  
**Must be explicitly selected**
